computed_masked_macc_boundary.active_lane_contract: accumulator + lhs * rhs where compare mask is true

artifact_abi.prototype: void tcrv_emitc_explicit_selected_body_computed_masked_macc_add_kernel_explicit_selected_body_rvv_computed_masked_macc_add(const int32_t *cmp_lhs, const int32_t *cmp_rhs, const int32_t *lhs, const int32_t *rhs, const int32_t *acc, int32_t *out, size_t n);

computed_masked_macc_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv computed-mask multiply-accumulate body/config/runtime facts
computed_masked_macc_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped; output tail sentinel preserved
computed_masked_macc_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv.masked_macc body/config/runtime facts -> computed-mask accumulation family plan -> math operand-binding facts -> route-control provider plan -> RVV-owned statement plan -> emitted compare, active MAcc, merge, and store

harness.accumulator_contract: inactive lanes preserve the explicit accumulator input while active lanes compute accumulator + lhs * rhs
harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.macc_distinguishing_contract: active-lane checks distinguish fused multiply-add accumulation from add-only or multiply-only behavior
harness.mask_coverage_contract: multi-lane computed_masked_macc_add cases require compare-produced active and inactive mask lanes
harness.tail_lane_contract: runtime n controls active lanes and output tail sentinels are preserved
